fortunes.text: One of your cats is judging you, but like… lovingly.
You will step over an imaginary cat today. Don’t question it.
A warm nap energy surrounds you. Resist or accept? Your choice.
You will think about snacks at least three times today.
Someone will say something weird today. Pretend you didn’t hear it.
A cat will appear in your thoughts uninvited. This is normal.
Tiggy is plotting against you. Watch out!.
You will misplace something and find out Peaches stole it.
Wolfie says you need to get Dairy Queen today or else something scary will happen.
A cosmic cat council has acknowledged your existence. This is a big deal.
You are being watched over by a giant interdimensional cat. They approve of you.
A legendary moment approaches. Wear your metaphorical wizard hat.
The universe just whispered your name. It sounded impressed.
Baymax says Paul needs to cook you a fancy dinner today.
Dopey stole something of yours and he forgot where he put it.
Your next sneeze will be dramatic and possibly life‑changing.
A cosmic paw from outer space has tapped you. Something good is coming.
You will crave a snack you don’t even own. Chaos.
A cat spirit has blessed your next stretch. Make it count.
You will laugh at something that wasn’t supposed to be funny.
A random object will fall over today. Pretend it was the wind.
Baymax knows all the secrets in the universe. Pet him to find out if you dare.
B is going to abandon the team to go to a reboot van while you die. He's so good at this game!
A cosmic meow will echo in your mind. You will have good luck today.
Munchkin can't wait to cuddle you today.
You went to grill hamburgers today, but for some reason all the buns are missing.
You must ask B how many are there???
Tom Selleck is jealous of Mikey's mustache and is coming for him to cut it off. Watch out Mikey!
If Paul doesn't feed the cats today, he owes you mall Chinese.
Kairi is going to save your life in Fortnite today.
A cat has chosen you as their favorite human today. Don’t mess it up.
You will experience a burst of confidence that feels illegal.
A cosmic whisker has brushed your aura. Something rare approaches.
You will accidentally predict the future today. Don’t freak out.
A future cat in another dimension just winked at you.
You will crave a nap for absolutely no reason. Cat influence detected.
Mikey will buy you V-Bucks today. If he doesn't, he will stub his toe everyday until he does.
Blue bear has silently approved your outfit today.
Jinwoo is coming to take you on a date. Sorry Paul.
If you say your favorite ice cream today 3 times, you will get it.
Blue Bear will help you pick your next snack decision.
Ask Paul for water today. If he doesn't give it to you, he's not allowed to drink any caffeine.
Eddie is coming to roast Mikey. Be careful!
A mysterious fluff will appear on your clothes. Cat magic confirmed.
A celestial whisker has touched your soul. You are now 15% more powerful.
Lila is going to sit in front of the TV until you give her attention.
If Paul doesn't wear his headset today, no boom booms for him.
Dopey has chosen to protect you today. He is doing a terrible job but the effort is adorable.
You got an ultimate fortune. B owes you a Fortnite skin.
You got an ultimate fortune. Eddie owes you Mexican.
You got an ultimate fortune. Mikey owes you pizza, ASAP.
